name: Stavropolenergosbyt Public Joint-Stock Company
summary: Stavropolenergosbyt Public Joint-Stock Company supplies electricity in the Stavropol territory, Russia. It serves approximately half a million customers, including producers, small businesses, and social and budgetary organizations; and the population of villages and cities, and individual entrepreneurs. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Yessentuki, Russia.
